detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部研究所碩士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 建築學研究方法 (The crafts of architectonic research)	開課班級 : 建築碩一	學　　分 : 3.0	授課時數 : 3.0
授課教師 : 吳松德,張旭福,曾逸仁,林美吟,袁興言,許正平,陳書毅,黃信穎	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
The objective of this course aims to brief to the new postgraduate students on the ways of degree examination, the fields of research in this school and the faculties of this school. It helps the new students to know the research advisers and to understand their experties. It also helps the students to find out the direction and goal of their research for the next few years. 


2.教學綱要
This course is organised into two major parts. In the first few weeks, students are briefed about the graduate school of architecture. This introduction consists of graduation processes, methods of research, research possibilities, advisers and their fields and some suggestions on graduate life in an island. This is followed by the second part that gives lecture or introduction by the members of faculty. The students are expected to give feedback about their expectations for their research, instead of one-wayedly receiving lecture.

Participating, Discussing, and Questioning.
